## Summary

<!-- Describe WHAT changed and WHY. Link to a GitHub Issue or Figma frame if applicable. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🎨 Token change (primitive, semantic, or theme)
- [ ] 🧱 Foundation change (CSS, reset, utilities)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / build config
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement

## Token Changes

> Complete this section if any token values were added, modified, or removed.

| Token | Before | After | Reason |
| ----- | ------ | ----- | ------ |
|       |        |       |        |

**Breaking change?**

- [ ] No — existing consumers are unaffected
- [ ] Yes — describe migration path below

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Color contrast verified (4.5:1 AA minimum for text, 3:1 for UI components)
- [ ] Focus states are visible and meet WCAG 2.4.11
- [ ] prefers-reduced-motion respected if animation is involved
- [ ] Tested with screen reader (VoiceOver / NVDA) if interaction is involved
- [ ] High-contrast theme tested

## Design Review

- [ ] Figma frames linked / updated
- [ ] Design token values match Figma variable values
- [ ] Reviewed by a designer on the DS team

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm build:tokens` passes without errors
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] Storybook stories added or updated for any visual change
- [ ] Tested in light + dark + high-contrast themes
